titleEn: Smooth transition expected to 2026-2027 Pacific Northwest apple crop
contentHtml: Apple supply is still strong with ample volume of varieties like Honeycrisp available across Washington State. "However, we continue to see tighter supplies of Red Delicious and Gala apples compared to previous years," says Keegan Morford, director of apple sales with Superfresh Growers®. "These reduced…
